title: Tender Salted Saudi Tomato Stir-fry
description: This vibrant dish features tender salted vine tomatoes in a flavorful sauce, perfect for brunch or light meals.
instructions: Trim the vine tomatoes and dice them into small pieces. Slice the onion thinly.
Heat a tablespoon of olive oil in a wok or frying pan over medium heat. Add the sliced onions first, stir-fry for about 2 minutes until translucent.
Add minced garlic to the onions and continue stirring for another minute until fragrant but not browned.

Toss in the diced vine tomatoes along with a pinch of red chili flakes (if using). Season with salt to taste and stir gently. Continue cooking for an additional 5-7 minutes, allowing the tomatoes to release their juices and soften slightly.
Remove from heat and serve immediately.
